visuals.title: Smart Contract Lifecycle
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Smart Contract Lifecycle
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Introduction to Smart Contracts</text>

  <!-- Code Block -->
  <rect x="30" y="50" width="360" height="120" fill="#0D47A1" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="11" fill="#E3F2FD" opacity="0">
    if (condition) {
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="11" fill="#E3F2FD" opacity="0">
      executeTransaction();
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="100" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="11" fill="#E3F2FD" opacity="0">
    }
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    Self-Executing Code on Blockchain
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow from Code to Output -->
  <line x1="210" y1="150" x2="210" y2="180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <polygon points="210,180 205,175 215,175" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>

  <!-- Output Result -->
  <rect x="160" y="190" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="215" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Result
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Properties Boxes -->
  <rect x="30" y="250" width="80" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="70" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Automated
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="130" y="250" width="80" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="170" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Trustless
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="230" y="250" width="80" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="270" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Immutable
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="330" y="250" width="80" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="370" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Transparent
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
